title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. linguiforme
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. linguiforme is a subspecies of plant within the Hieracium genus, commonly known as the smooth hawk's-beard. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. linguiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the healing of wounds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
